dataset.name: SHEBA Atmospheric Surface Flux Group hourly tower data
notes: Catalog derived from data/sheba/raw/readme_ASFG3.0.txt and the headers of main_file6_hd.txt and prof_file_all6_ed_hd.txt.
Use normalized column names when reading with CSV.jl normalizenames=true; dots and asterisks are converted to underscores.
The prof_file_all6_ed_hd.txt level families 1-5 should be interpreted together with z1-z5, which provide the actual measurement heights.

sources.description: Two-level hourly ASFG file derived from the 5-level profile file by interpolating temperature, humidity, and wind to 2.5 m and 10 m and by adding bulk flux estimates.

variables.title: Julian day
variables.description: Julian day counter used by the SHEBA ASFG files; Jan 1 1997 is day 1 and Jan 1 1998 is day 366.

variables.title: Latitude
variables.description: Platform latitude.

variables.title: Longitude
variables.description: Platform longitude.

variables.title: Surface pressure
variables.description: Observed surface pressure used in the ASFG processing and bulk flux calculations.

variables.title: Wind speed at 2.5 m
variables.description: Interpolated hourly wind speed at 2.5 m.

variables.title: Wind speed at 10 m
variables.description: Interpolated hourly wind speed at 10 m.

variables.title: Wind direction at 2.5 m
variables.description: True wind direction at 2.5 m after tower-rotation correction.

variables.title: Wind direction at 10 m
variables.description: True wind direction at 10 m after tower-rotation correction.

variables.title: Air temperature at 2.5 m
variables.description: Interpolated hourly air temperature at 2.5 m.

variables.title: Air temperature at 10 m
variables.description: Interpolated hourly air temperature at 10 m.

variables.title: Humidity mixing ratio at 2.5 m
variables.description: Interpolated hourly humidity mixing ratio at 2.5 m.

variables.title: Humidity mixing ratio at 10 m
variables.description: Interpolated hourly humidity mixing ratio at 10 m.

variables.title: Relative humidity with respect to ice at 2.5 m
variables.description: Interpolated hourly relative humidity with respect to ice at 2.5 m.

variables.title: Relative humidity with respect to ice at 10 m
variables.description: Interpolated hourly relative humidity with respect to ice at 10 m.

variables.title: Best-estimate surface temperature
variables.description: Best estimate of surface temperature, primarily based on corrected Eppley radiometer temperatures with Barnes support when needed.

variables.title: Eppley surface temperature
variables.description: Surface temperature from the Eppley radiometer; generally the most reliable radiometric surface temperature.

variables.title: Barnes surface temperature
variables.description: Surface temperature from the Barnes radiometer.

variables.title: Ice temperature
variables.description: Ice temperature estimate from the ASFG dataset.

variables.title: Downwelling longwave radiation
variables.description: Downwelling longwave radiative flux.

variables.title: Upwelling longwave radiation
variables.description: Upwelling longwave radiative flux.

variables.title: Downwelling shortwave radiation
variables.description: Downwelling shortwave radiative flux.

variables.title: Upwelling shortwave radiation
variables.description: Upwelling shortwave radiative flux.

variables.title: Original precipitation rate
variables.description: Original precipitation-rate estimate retained in the ASFG file.

variables.title: NCAR-corrected precipitation rate
variables.description: NCAR-corrected precipitation-rate estimate retained in the ASFG file.

variables.title: Tower orientation
variables.description: Orientation of the tower sonic boom arms used to convert measured wind direction to true wind direction.

variables.title: Vertical wind speed
variables.description: Vertical wind component in the two-level file.

variables.title: Friction velocity
variables.description: Median friction velocity from levels with good turbulence measurements.

variables.title: Sensible heat flux
variables.description: Median sensible heat flux from levels with good turbulence measurements.

variables.title: Latent heat flux
variables.description: Eddy-correlation latent heat flux from the Ophir instruments; the readme recommends cautious use because values are low relative to bulk estimates.

variables.title: Bulk friction velocity at 2.5 m
variables.description: Bulk-algorithm friction velocity referenced to 2.5 m.

variables.title: Bulk friction velocity at 10 m
variables.description: Bulk-algorithm friction velocity referenced to 10 m.

variables.title: Bulk sensible heat flux at 2.5 m
variables.description: Bulk sensible heat flux referenced to 2.5 m.

variables.title: Bulk sensible heat flux at 10 m
variables.description: Bulk sensible heat flux referenced to 10 m.

variables.title: Bulk latent heat flux at 2.5 m
variables.description: Bulk latent heat flux referenced to 2.5 m.

variables.title: Bulk latent heat flux at 10 m
variables.description: Bulk latent heat flux referenced to 10 m.

variables.title: Bulk momentum roughness length at 2.5 m
variables.description: Bulk roughness length for momentum at 2.5 m.

variables.title: Bulk momentum roughness length at 10 m
variables.description: Bulk roughness length for momentum at 10 m.

variables.title: Bulk thermal roughness length at 2.5 m
variables.description: Bulk roughness length for temperature at 2.5 m.

variables.title: Bulk thermal roughness length at 10 m
variables.description: Bulk roughness length for temperature at 10 m.

variables.title: Bulk moisture roughness length at 2.5 m
variables.description: Bulk roughness length for humidity at 2.5 m.

variables.title: Bulk moisture roughness length at 10 m
variables.description: Bulk roughness length for humidity at 10 m. The raw header uses 'zogb10'; keep that spelling for file-level fidelity, but it likely denotes the moisture roughness length analogous to zoqb2.5.

sources.description: Five-level hourly tower profile file with radiometer, surface, turbulence variance, structure-function, and quality-control fields.

variables.title: Julian day
variables.description: Julian day counter used by the SHEBA ASFG files; Jan 1 1997 is day 1 and Jan 1 1998 is day 366.

variables.title: Latitude
variables.description: Platform latitude.

variables.title: Longitude
variables.description: Platform longitude.

variables.title: Surface pressure
variables.description: Observed surface pressure used in processing and flux calculations.
Actual measurement height for tower level {index}. Use these heights when plotting or fitting profile-family variables at matching level indices.

variables.title: Ophir measurement height
variables.description: Height of the Ophir-related measurement level used with latent-heat instrumentation.
Tower wind speed at level {index}; pair with z{index} for the actual height.
True wind direction at level {index} after tower-orientation correction.
Vertical wind component at level {index}.
Friction velocity derived from the sonic measurements at level {index}.
Tower air temperature at level {index}.
Humidity mixing ratio at level {index}.
Relative humidity at level {index}; use rhi{index} when humidity relative to ice is required.

variables.titleTemplate: Relative humidity with respect to ice at level {index}
variables.description: Relative humidity with respect to ice at level {index}; recalculated from the original measurement relative to water.

variables.title: General Eastern temperature
variables.description: General Eastern temperature-related surface measurement retained in the ASFG file.

variables.title: General Eastern dewpoint temperature
variables.description: General Eastern dewpoint temperature.

variables.title: Eppley surface temperature
variables.description: Surface temperature from the Eppley radiometer; generally the most reliable radiometric surface temperature.

variables.title: Barnes surface temperature
variables.description: Surface temperature from the Barnes radiometer.

variables.title: Snow temperature
variables.description: Snow temperature estimate.

variables.title: Ice temperature
variables.description: Ice temperature estimate.

variables.title: Best-estimate surface temperature
variables.description: Best estimate of surface temperature, principally based on corrected Eppley temperatures with Barnes support when needed.

variables.title: Downwelling longwave radiation
variables.description: Downwelling longwave radiative flux.

variables.title: Upwelling longwave radiation
variables.description: Upwelling longwave radiative flux.

variables.title: Downwelling shortwave radiation
variables.description: Downwelling shortwave radiative flux.

variables.title: Upwelling shortwave radiation
variables.description: Upwelling shortwave radiative flux.

variables.title: Original precipitation rate
variables.description: Original precipitation-rate estimate retained in the ASFG file.

variables.title: NCAR-corrected precipitation rate
variables.description: NCAR-corrected precipitation-rate estimate retained in the ASFG file.

variables.title: Tower orientation
variables.description: Orientation of the tower sonic boom arms used to calculate true wind direction.
Sensible heat flux at level {index}.

variables.title: Latent heat flux
variables.description: Eddy-correlation latent heat flux from the Ophir instruments; the ASFG readme recommends cautious use because it is low relative to bulk estimates.
Variance-like second-moment quantity for the streamwise wind component at level {index}.
Variance-like second-moment quantity for the cross-stream wind component at level {index}.
Variance-like second-moment quantity for the vertical wind component at level {index}.
Temperature variance-like second moment at level {index}.
Structure-function parameter C_u^2 for the streamwise wind component at level {index}.
Structure-function parameter C_v^2 for the cross-stream wind component at level {index}.
Structure-function parameter C_w^2 for the vertical wind component at level {index}.
Structure-function parameter C_T^2 for temperature at level {index}.
Number of points used in the turbulence FFT at level {index}.
Quality-control flag for turbulence data at level {index}; if the flag is 1, the wind data may also be suspect because it is derived from the sonic measurements.
